body.title: Igor launcher wraps itself in named tmux session
body.text:
# D-igor-tmux-session-launcher-2026-04-26

**title:** Igor launcher wraps itself in named tmux session

**date:** 2026-04-26

**status:** open

**spawned_tickets:** T-igor-tmux-session-launcher

## Decision narrative

Igor launcher (TheIgors/igor) now wraps itself in a named tmux session (IGOR_TMUX_SESSION, default: igor) so that terminal disconnect or close doesn't kill the restart loop mid-run. If already inside tmux, execs directly (no double-wrap). Committed in ea0cba88. Ticket is a traceability backfill.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-28T21:32:47.750835+00:00
**Ticket count:** 1 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-igor-tmux-session-launcher (S) — igor launcher — start in named tmux session  `done` — Backfill only — impl shipped in ea0cba88. No code changes needed. Closed by CC.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
